name: Obscura - Headless Browser
description: Knowledge for using obscura — a lightweight headless browser for web scraping, JS rendering, CDP server (Puppeteer/Playwright), and MCP server. No dependencies; single binary.
brief: You can use the `obscura` headless browser for fetching pages, rendering JS, scraping URLs in parallel, running a CDP server, or an MCP server. Load this skill with `use_skill('obscura')`.
author: Evonic
